subject: Single error box for GRB000315
body:
E. Mazets, S. Golenetskii, P. Butterworth, and T. Cline, on behalf of the
KONUS-Wind team, report:

From the count rate ratio in the two KONUS detectors, we
have determined that the first error box for GRB000315
(Hurley et al. GCN 614) is the correct one:

    RA(2000)                 DEC(2000)
 22 h 43 m 20.56 s     17 o 59 '  35.54 "  (CENTER)
 22 h 43 m 26.35 s     17 o 58 '  14.67 "  (CORNER)
 22 h 43 m 11.47 s     17 o 56 '   5.72 "  (CORNER)
 22 h 43 m 29.63 s     18 o  3 '   5.58 "  (CORNER)
 22 h 43 m 14.76 s     18 o  0 '  56.38 "  (CORNER)
